name: Galaxy Surfactants Limited
summary: Galaxy Surfactants Limited manufactures and markets specialty chemicals for personal and home care industries in India and internationally. The company offers surfactants, mild surfactants, rheology modifiers, pearlizing agents, syndet and soap bases, UV filters, and active ingredients, as well as conditioning agents, blends, proteins, and quats. It serves the skin, hair, sun, oral, baby, and home care markets. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Navi Mumbai, India.
